name: Spare Bulb Salt Lamps
Quality Natural Salt Candle Holder
description: AWGifts Dropship Europe´s Himalayan Salt Candle Holders are made from natural Himalayan Crystal Salt Rock. They are a natural ionizer and air purifier.By using a Himalayan Salt Candle Holder you replace the negatively charged ions in the air which helps us to avoid the alleged physical and mental harm that the ‘electric smog’ creates. Negative ions cleanse the air by removing dust, pollen, and bacteria.Himalayan Salt Candle holders naturally contain cracks and veins that make each one unique. The colours range from light pink to a deep dark pink.Our salt candle holder create a relaxing warm atmosphere to any room. It will add some romance feeling for your dining room, bedrooms or anywhere (not humid area) you preferred. Safety rule: It’s always important to keep a burning candle within sight and keep it out of the reach of children and pets.Note: Natural salt candle holder size and shape may vary.

name: Molten Glass on Wood - Small Bowl
description: AWGifts Dropship Europe  handmade Melted Glass on Wood is finally here. Probably the biggest thing out of Bali in years, in Holland already a massive trend. Everything house plant related and natural is a major trend, and this beautiful and natural product is right on the button. They are crafted by hand in Bali from recycled glass and Balinese Gamal wood. This stunning, molten art glass vase brings the best of two worlds together: natural and man-made; earthy and chic; practical and spiritual. Molten Glass on Wood - Small Bowl  is hand-blown and while still hot it is then relaxed over a piece of Gamal root, the glass then hardens to the shape of the wood ensuring a perfect fit. They are crafted using a natural product by using hand tools in the traditional Balinese way. It provides a one-of-a-kind setting for stones and air plants, cut flowers, a fish tank or a wine decanter. Each item is unique as they are made from natural sustainable Gamal wood and the recycled glass is shaped to suit which add to its authenticity, your customer will love it. They can be used for house plants, zen gardens, fish bowls or floating candles.Bring nature inside with these absolutely beautiful (and affordable) natural works of art, which your customers are really going to want to own. Bowl Size:H:9cm D:7cm On The Wood Stand:H:14cmBarcode:5055796593620Please note: That due to the handmade nature of this product, there can be small imperfections in the glass such as small bubbles and light scratches. Mostly individually securely boxed.Your customers will love this product. Order today🔥

name: Tree of Life Dreamcatcher - Pure & Natural 16cm
description: Native Americans believe the night brings good and bad dreams. The Dreamcatcher, when hung near your bed, catches the dreams. The good dreams know how to pass through the dream catcher, the bad dreams not knowing the way get tangled in the dream catcher and perish with the first light of dawn.In Bali, the locals are very much in touch with the spirit world and have adopted the dream catcher and renewed its power.This dream catcher is made with love and blessings. Sweet dreams.The weight of the Dreamcatcher is 78gSize: Diameter 16cm, Lenght 60cm

name: Wood Carved Elephant - Turquois Gold
description: Elephants symbolize noble things such as wisdom, courage, stature and strength. These Elephants have been lightly painted in white and turquoise colours and added a golden glitter to it.These beautiful Hand Carved Elephant will bring an old world feeling of Bali into any room. Hand carved in Indonesia from Albesia wood, which is a fast-growing sustainable tree which can grow to 70 feet in just a few years and is found all over South East Asia.Ornamental Elephants are supposed to be good luck, these make a perfect gift for an elephant lover or anyone who appreciates the skill it takes to craft such a fine piece. As each elephant is handmade, colour, designs and dimensions may vary slightly making each one a unique collectable.

name: Tree of Life Dreamcatcher - 12cm (assorted)
description: Native Americans believe the night brings good and bad dreams. The Dreamcatcher, when hung near your bed, catches the dreams. The good dreams know how to pass through the dream catcher, the bad dreams not knowing the way get tangled in the dream catcher and perish with the first light of dawn.In Bali, the locals are very much in touch with the spirit world and have adopted the dream catcher and renewed its power.This dream catcher is made with love and blessings. Sweet dreams.Weight of the Dreamcatcher is 18gSize: Diameter 12cm, Lenght 45cm

name: Quality Natural Salt Lamp - & Base apx 2-3kg
description: By using a AWGifts Dropship Europe Himalayan Crystal Salt Lamp you replace the negatively charged ions in the air which helps us to avoid the alleged physical and mental harm that the ‘electric smog’ creates.Each Salt Lamp comes complete with light fitting, bulb & plug. Rather then sell them by size we sell them by approximate weight. Items are marked with sizes to give a rough idea of size only, each lamp is completely unique.Please note:Due to the hygroscopic properties of salt Himalayan salt lamps and candle holders absorb moisture from the air.If your lamp is 'sweating' or leaking water this is generally due to being switched off for extended periods, especially in humid conditions. To remedy, leave in strong sunlight for 4 to 5 hours and brush off any excess crystals. Or wipe gently with a dry cloth. If you don't use Himalayan salt lamp for long periods of time (eg when on holidays), disconnect the cable and remove it from the lamp. In humid conditions we recommend placing your lamp onto a small tray or dish in case they may pool water.

name: Balance Wine Holders - Mouse
description: Take a look at this perfect wooden balancing Wine Bottle Holders - Mouse. As the whole range depicts different animals, each wine holder is a magic gift for any occasions.These beautiful and unusual bottle holders from Indonesia merge together contemporary lines and great art. Ideal to hold bottles of great wine or some olive oil bottles.Each of them will provide a talking point at the dinner table or wherever they are displayed. Handmade with natural high-quality Suar wood, it accentuates the unique wood patterns.Note: This is a very rare product where our artisans can only make a limited quantity, so we can't guarantee to be always in stock. They are all painstakingly carved from one piece of wood (except for the snail's eyes), making for a nice detail and a better class of wine holder.

name: New Hati-Hati Angel - Love - 15cm
description: Hati-Hati Angel - Love - 15cm is hand carved in mountain villages from Suar-wood a sustainable hardwood. This wood is used to create beautiful and often sacred images, Hati-Hati angels make beautiful, cultural and caring gifts. Every angel has been carefully carved by hand, sun dried, finished, polished and painted by artisans in rural areas, Hat-hati is a common Indonesian word meaning take care. So these angels are designed to bring love and caring to all who hold them.  Each angel comes with lovely info header card.

name: Natural Coconut Lamp - Natural Wrapover
description: This lamp is as natural as can be. Made from an actual coconut leaf, a special type that can be reformed and bent into shapes when heated. The shade is made from cotton ball formed shape. So every piece is from nature and therefore unique - the shapes all vary slightly. Your customers will love to the select one they like best.  Simple, natural and affordable. They come with a EU light fitting but no bulb.  Made by a family business in Bali.

name: Buddah Painting - Gold Sand Finish

name: Teak Chopping Board - 30cm
description: This beautiful and very special hand carved range of Teak Chopping Boards - 30cm from AWGifts Dropshipping has been crafted in East Java, Indonesia from carefully managed teak reserves. Teak or Tectona grandis is native to mainly Indonesia, India, Malaysia, Thailand and Burma. Teak wood contains an oil that helps the wood to be water resistant this same oil content protects the Teak from decay, insects and bacteria.Java teak is considered by experts to be the best in the world. Teak a peak today.

Molten Glass on Whitewash Wood - Medium Bowl
description: Crafted by hand in Bali from recycled glass and Balinese Gamal wood. This AWGifts Dropship Europe stunning Molten Glass on Whitewash Wood - Small Bowl brings the best of two worlds together: natural and man-made; earthy and chic; practical and spiritual. The glass is hand-blown and while still hot it is then relaxed over a piece of Gamal root, the glass then hardens to the shape of the wood ensuring a perfect fit. They are crafted using a natural product by using hand tools in the traditional Balinese way. name: Small Notebook with strap - Tibetan Mandala
description: AWGifts Dropship Europe Small Notebook with Strap - Tibetan Mandala is truly amazing and one-of-a-kind. Handmade from Indian vegetable tanned leather and paper.Vegetable tanning was the major tanning method until the 20th century and is growing in importance once again now. It uses extracts of barks, leaves, fruits, berries, roots and wood. This method of tanning is safe for the environment and leather workers as well.Vegetable tanned leather is left to breathe. It can take up to 2 weeks to dry until they turn a nice beige colour. Nature’s elements seep into its grain over time, enhancing its authentic and earthy character. This notebook will age beautifully over time.You may also like our Handmade Leather Journals or Designer Notebooks.Notebook is good sized, with strap, and will be a great pick-up line in any gift shop. name: Swirls Shaped Vase - Cream
description: Lombok Ceramic Vases are beautiful and unique works of art handmade on the island of Lombok. The vases are made of terracotta, a type of clay, shaped into various shapes and sizes. The vases are decorated with various patterns inspired by the rich cultural heritage of Indonesia. The designs range from simple geometric patterns to natural motifs. Painted in neutral colours - white, cream and black.Finished products are functional works of art that can be used to hold flowers, plants or other decorative items. Not only are they aesthetically pleasing, they are also durable and long-lasting, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. Lombok Ceramic Vases are a fine example of the traditional art of Indonesian pottery and are prized by collectors and enthusiasts alike. Diameter of the neck inside: approx. 3.5cm

description: Elevate the outdoor grilling game with our Himalayan Salt BBQ Cooking Plate. With excellent heat retention, it transforms your BBQ sessions into gourmet culinary adventures.These plates are laden with essential minerals such as potassium, magnesium, and calcium.Gradually heat it to the desired cooking temperature, starting with low heat to avoid cracking. name: Molten Crackled Glass Tank on Wood
description: Introducing a Bali sensation: Handmade Melted Glass on Wood, a true masterpiece that has taken Bali by storm!Handcrafted in Bali with a touch of artistry, these Molten Crackled Glass Tanks on Wood unite two worlds in perfect harmony: the natural and the artistic; the rustic and the sophisticated; the functional and the spiritual. The process begins with the skilled hand-blowing of glass, followed by the artful relaxation of the glass over a Balinese Gamal wood root while it's still warm. As the glass cools and solidifies, it gracefully molds itself to the contours of the wood, creating a flawless fusion.Welcome the beauty of nature into your spaces with these incredibly stunning, and surprisingly affordable, pieces of natural artistry. Your customers are bound to fall in love with these unique creations – a captivating blend of art and nature.Please note: Due to the handmade nature of this product, there can be small imperfections in the glass such as small bubbles and light scratches. Sizes and designs may vary slightly. Make a lovely natural display and grow some great sales. Add to Product Portfolio today.

This masterpiece effortlessly bridges two worlds: the natural and the artistic, the rustic and the sophisticated, the functional and the spiritual.Our journey begins with the skilled craftsmanship of glass-blowing, where every piece is meticulously shaped by hand. Then comes the artful melding of glass with a Balinese Gamal wood root while it's still warm. As the glass cools and takes on its final form, it elegantly conforms to the contours of the wood, resulting in a seamless and exquisite fusion.These remarkable creations welcome the inherent beauty of nature into your spaces, offering not only aesthetic allure but also affordability that surprises. name: Figure Shape - Angel 3x5x7 inch
description: Each Salt Lamp comes complete with light fitting, bulb & EU type plug.By using a Himalayan Crystal Salt Lamp you replace the negatively charged ions in the air which helps us to avoid the alleged physical and mental harm that the ‘electric smog’ creates.Each Salt Lamp comes complete with light fitting, bulb & plug. Rather than sell them by size we sell them by approximate weight. Items are marked with sizes to give a rough idea of size only, each lamp is completely unique.Please note:Due to the hygroscopic properties of salt Himalayan salt lamps and candle holders absorb moisture from the air. If your lamp is 'sweating' or leaking water this is generally due to being switched off for extended periods, especially in humid conditions. To remedy, leave in strong sunlight for 4 to 5 hours and brush off any excess crystals. Or wipe gently with a dry cloth.If you don't use the Himalayan salt lamp for long periods of time (eg when on holidays), disconnect the cable and remove it from the lamp.In humid conditions, we recommend placing your lamp onto a small tray or dish in case they may pool water.These are supplied in protective cardboard boxes which may become damp in transit due to their hygroscopic properties.11x17x19 (cm)2.1Kg

name: Handmade Indigo Throw - 170x120cm - Kasba Tiles
description: The Journey of Creation Our Handmade Indigo Throws are brought to life through a meticulous and time-honored process. Master craftsmen immerse the fabric in natural indigo dye baths, layer by layer, to attain the deep, resplendent blue shades that define indigo textiles. Various resist techniques, such as tie-dye, block printing, or batik, are employed to craft intricate patterns and designs on the fabric, transforming it into a canvas of artistic expression.   The dyed fabric is gently sun-dried, allowing the indigo to undergo oxidation, gradually revealing its iconic blue hue, radiant as the Indian sky. Each throw is lovingly finished with hand-stitched embroidery or adorned with tassels, adding a touch of authenticity and individuality to every piece. Incorporating Handmade Indigo Throws into your product portfolio doesn't merely enrich your offerings; it connects your customers with the rich history and artistry of India. These throws transcend mere textiles; they are cultural and traditional treasures that will captivate your customers and elevate their living spaces.Join us in celebrating the art of indigo dyeing and the timeless beauty it bestows upon the world of home décor.

Timor Tribal Decorative Mask - Black 27x20cm
description: On the remote island of Timor, nestled in Maritime Southeast Asia, the indigenous tribes hold a profound reverence for their ancestors and the deities that guard their way of life. For generations, these tribes have meticulously carved masks and figures as a tribute to these celestial beings, seeking their protection and blessings. These intricate handcrafted masks play a pivotal role in the spiritual fabric of the community. Predominantly, they come to life during religious and ceremonial dances. When donned by a chosen few, be it priests, shamans, or designated dancers, the mask transcends its wooden form. The individual wearing it is believed to become a conduit, channelling the very essence of the spirit or deity it represents. This transformation is not taken lightly; wearing the mask is a weighty responsibility, and only specific members of the community are entrusted with this honour. Beyond the dance and ceremony, these masks find a cherished place within the homes of the tribespeople. Their mere presence is said to invoke the spirits or deities, standing as vigilant sentinels against malevolent forces. Strategic placement in the home enhances their protective aura. Some masks are positioned near the entrance, forming an ethereal barrier against negative energies. Others are set facing outward, their gaze a deterrent to any lurking evil. However, to harness the full potency of these masks, one cannot simply place them and forget. Ritualistic care, akin to tending to a sacred flame, is essential. The spirit or deity residing within expects regular offerings and rituals to maintain its benevolent guardianship. Families might present offerings of food, burn fragrant incense, or whisper age-old prayers, ensuring that the mask's protective qualities remain vibrant and unyielding. Through these practices, the masks continue their silent vigil, guarding homes and hearts across generations.

name: Molten Coloured Glass on Wood - Small Bowl
description: Molten Coloured Glass on Wood - Small Bowl crafted by hand in Bali from recycled glass and Balinese sustainable Gamal wood, this stunning piece of art brings the best of two worlds together: natural and man-made; earthy and chic; practical and spiritual.The glass is hand-blown and while still hot, it is relaxed over a piece of Gamal root, the glass then hardens to the shape of the wood ensuring a perfect fit. It is crafted using a natural product by using hand tools in the traditional Balinese way. Molten Glass on Wood provides a one-of-a-kind setting for stones and air plants, cut flowers, a fish tank or a wine decanter. Your customer will love it. It can be used for house plants, zen gardens, fishbowls or floating candles. * Eco-friendly, handcrafted of 100% recycled glass ** Made of Gamal wood root and hand blown glass ** Handcrafted by skilled glass blowing artisans *

These pieces feature similar intricate designs and together, they’ll transform any display into a natural oasis that customers won’t be able to resist.Dimensions:10 x 10,5 cm The glossy enamel finish enhances the intricate pattern, catching the light and giving it a subtle shine, while the natural wooden base keeps the look warm and grounded. It’s the kind of piece that quietly draws attention without overpowering your décor.Charming and easy to style, it works beautifully in feminine, cottagecore, or spring-inspired interiors - and also makes a thoughtful little gift that feels personal and full of warmth.

name: Med Mushroom -  15cm - Mediterranean Tile Pattern
description: This vibrant mushroom ornament brings a burst of Mediterranean colour into your space. The detailed tile-inspired pattern creates a rich, layered look that draws the eye and adds instant personality to shelves, side tables, or styled corners. The glossy enamel surface catches the light, making the colours feel even more alive, while the natural wooden base adds warmth and contrast. It’s a piece that feels both decorative and grounded, easy to mix with plants, ceramics, or other textured décor.Perfect for eclectic or travel-inspired interiors, it adds a playful yet refined accent and makes a thoughtful gift for anyone who loves bold patterns and unique home details.

name: Medium Enamelled Mushroom - 15cm - Pastel Hearts
description: A playful mix of soft pastel hearts brings a light, joyful feel to this charming mushroom ornament. The gentle colours add warmth without overwhelming, making it easy to style on shelves, bedside tables, or in a cosy nook that needs a little lift. The smooth enamel finish gives the design a subtle shine, helping the colours stand out, while the natural wooden base keeps the look calm and grounded. It’s a small detail that makes a space feel more personal and inviting.Perfect for adding a hint of sweetness to your décor, it suits relaxed, feminine, or eclectic interiors and makes a thoughtful gift that feels cheerful and full of character.

name: Medium Enamelled Mushroom - 15cm - Pretty Floral
description: A soft floral pattern gives this mushroom ornament a fresh, uplifting feel that instantly brightens your space. The delicate mix of pinks, lilacs, and greens creates a light, airy look - perfect for adding a gentle touch of colour without overwhelming your décor. The glossy enamel surface enhances the detail of the design, catching the light and adding a subtle shine, while the natural wooden base brings warmth and balance. It’s a piece that feels calm, inviting, and easy to style.Beautiful on shelves, bedside tables, or styled with other decorative accents, it suits feminine, cottage-inspired, or relaxed interiors and makes a thoughtful gift with a soft, timeless charm.

name: Large Enamelled Mushroom - 20cm - Mediterranean Tile Pattern
description: A bold Mediterranean tile pattern gives this larger mushroom ornament real presence, turning it into a standout piece rather than just a small accent. The intricate mix of colours and geometric detail brings a warm, sun-soaked feel that instantly energises your space. The glossy enamel finish enhances every detail, catching the light and adding depth, while the natural wooden base keeps the look balanced and organic. Its larger size makes it ideal for styling as a focal point on shelves, consoles, or coffee tables.Perfect for eclectic, boho, or travel-inspired interiors, it adds character and vibrancy with ease and makes a striking gift for anyone who loves unique, decorative pieces with personality.

name: Large Enamelled Mushroom - 20cm - Pastel Hearts
description: A cheerful scatter of pastel hearts gives this larger mushroom ornament a playful, feel-good energy that instantly lifts your space. The soft yet vibrant colours stand out beautifully against the glossy enamel surface, creating a light-catching finish that draws attention without feeling overwhelming. Set on a natural wooden base, the design keeps its warmth and balance, making it easy to style in both relaxed and more decorative interiors. Its larger size gives it real presence - perfect for shelves or consoles.Ideal for adding a touch of joy and personality, it works especially well in bright, feminine, or eclectic spaces and makes a lovely gift that feels fun, warm, and full of charm.

name: Large Mushroom - 20cm -  Pretty Floral
description: A delicate floral pattern gives this larger mushroom ornament a soft, uplifting presence that gently brightens your space. The blend of pinks, lilacs, and subtle greens creates a fresh, calming feel - perfect for bringing a light, decorative touch to your home. The glossy enamel finish enhances the design details, catching the light and adding a gentle sheen, while the natural wooden base keeps the overall look warm and grounded. Its larger size makes it ideal for styling as a feature piece on shelves, consoles, or dressing tables.Elegant yet easy to place, it suits feminine, cottage-inspired, or relaxed interiors and makes a thoughtful gift that feels timeless, gentle, and full of charm.

name: Cotton Wall Art - Mandala Elephant
description: Cotton Wall Art - Mandala Elephant A burst of colour and pattern that instantly lifts a room. This cotton wall hanging blends a vivid mandala with a ring of small elephant motifs, creating a lively, artistic focal point. Made in India and sized at 78 x 112 cm, it works beautifully as wall décor, a backdrop for creative spaces, or a lightweight statement piece above a bed or sofa. The detailed circular design draws the eye in, while the elephants add a symbolic touch of strength and good fortune. The soft cotton fabric makes it easy to hang, fold, or move around whenever your space needs a refresh.Ideal for anyone who loves bold prints, global-inspired décor, or colourful textiles that bring warmth and personality to a room.

name: Cotton Wall Art - Zodiac
description: Cotton Wall Art - Zodiac A bold, cosmic wall hanging that brings colour, symbolism, and a touch of mystique into your space. The vibrant zodiac wheel sits against a star-filled backdrop, creating an eye-catching focal point for any room. Made in India and sized at 78 x 112 cm, this lightweight cotton piece is easy to hang and works beautifully as décor for bedrooms, reading corners, meditation spaces, or anywhere you want a celestial mood. The detailed zodiac chart, lunar phases, and radiant gradient tones make it ideal for astrology lovers or anyone drawn to colourful, cosmic-inspired art.It’s a simple way to add personality, warmth, and a little stargazing magic to your home.

name: Cotton Wall Art - Mermaid
description: Cotton Wall Art - Mermaid A striking, ocean-inspired wall hanging that brings colour, mystery, and myth into your space. The bold mermaid design stands out against a deep backdrop, creating an instant statement piece. Made in India and sized at 78 x 112 cm, this cotton wall art is light, easy to hang, and perfect for bedrooms, creative corners, or anyone who loves magical or sea-themed décor. The vibrant gradient tones highlight the mermaid’s flowing form, framed by intricate shells and aquatic motifs that add depth and texture.It’s a simple way to bring a touch of fantasy and artistic character to your home.

name: Cotton Wall Art - Ying Yang
description: Cotton Wall Art - Ying Yang A vibrant take on the classic Yin Yang symbol, this colourful cotton wall hanging adds balance, energy, and a bold visual punch to any room. Made in India and sized at 78 x 112 cm, it features a bright central Yin Yang surrounded by radiating patterns and repeating symbols, all set against a deep black background that makes the colours glow. Lightweight and easy to hang, it works well in bedrooms, creative spaces, meditation corners, or anywhere that could use a mix of harmony and striking design.Perfect for anyone who loves spiritual décor or bold, expressive art that stands out.

name: Cotton Wall Art - World
description: Cotton Wall Art - World A bold, colourful world map that instantly brightens your space. The vibrant continents stand out beautifully against the deep black backdrop, giving your room a modern, travel-inspired look. Made in India and sized at 78 x 112 cm, this lightweight cotton piece is easy to hang and works well in bedrooms, studios, offices, or anywhere that needs a splash of colour and wanderlust. The soft tie-dye tones blend into each other, creating a painterly effect that feels both artistic and uplifting.Ideal for travel lovers, students, or anyone who likes décor with personality and global flair.

Set of 3 Pebble Shaped Mirrors - Dark Brown Finish
description: Bring a natural, relaxed feel into your home with this set of 3 pebble-shaped mirrors. The soft, irregular shapes are inspired by nature, creating a gentle, organic look that adds warmth and character to any space. Each mirror is framed in smooth dark brown wood, highlighting the natural grain and giving every piece its own unique finish. Whether placed together as a statement feature or styled separately, they add depth and visual interest without overpowering your décor.Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or hallways, this mirror set blends effortlessly with boho, rustic, or modern interiors. A simple way to refresh your space with something a little different and beautifully understated.

String Fish and Blue Copis Drop
description: Add a calming, coastal touch to your home with this beautiful String Fish & Blue Capiz Shell Drop. Handmade with natural driftwood and shimmering blue capiz shells, it gently sways in the breeze and creates a soft, soothing sound – perfect for bringing a relaxed, seaside feel to your space.Whether you hang it in a sunny window, on a wall, or in a sheltered outdoor area, this piece adds a light and airy charm inspired by the ocean.Why You’ll Love It:🌊 Ocean-inspired design with shades of blue and natural materials🌿 Handcrafted from real driftwood and capiz shell🌬️ Creates a gentle, calming sound when the shells move🧵 Fairly traded and handmade in Indonesia📏 Approx. size: 50–55 cm longPerfect for boho, beachy, or summer-themed interiors — or as a unique gift for ocean lovers.Each piece is one of a kind, so slight variations in colour and size are part of its charm.

name: Bluewash Fish Carving and Natural Copis Drop
description: Bring a sense of peace and balance to your space with the Whitewash Turtle & Natural Capiz Shell Drop – a charming handmade piece inspired by the ocean.Featuring a soft whitewashed driftwood turtle, this decoration hangs above a cascade of natural capiz shells that shimmer beautifully in the light. As they move gently, the shells create a soft, soothing sound – perfect for calm corners, cosy reading spots, or covered outdoor spaces.Why You’ll Love It:🐢 Turtle design symbolising peace and longevity🌿 Made from sustainable driftwood and capiz shell🎶 Gentle tinkling sound adds to the relaxing mood🧵 Handmade and fairly traded from Indonesia📏 Approx. size: 45–48 cm hanging lengthA lovely choice for ocean-inspired homes, boho interiors, or as a thoughtful gift for nature lovers and those who appreciate ethical, handcrafted décor.Each piece is unique – slight variations in size and colour are part of its handmade charm.

name: String Fish and Natural Copis Drop
description: Bring peace and simplicity to your space with the String Fish & Natural Capiz Shell Drop – a beautifully handcrafted decoration that blends rustic charm with a soft, elegant shimmer.At the top sits a carved driftwood fish, with a vertical cascade of delicate white capiz shells that gently catch the light and create a soft, soothing chime in the breeze. name: Bali Patio Parasol - Cotton - Orange Decor - 1.5m
description: Bali Patio Parasol - Cotton - Orange Decor - 1.5m Bright, bold, and full of character. This orange Bali Patio Parasol brings the warmth of island sunsets into your outdoor space, creating a vibrant focal point steeped in traditional craftsmanship.Handmade in Indonesia, it stands 2 metres tall with a 1.5-metre canopy crafted from natural cotton and supported by a sturdy Dorran wood pole with an aluminium core The parasol is adorned with golden heart-shaped ornaments, tassels, and a hand-loomed cotton weave at the centre - a technique that reflects generations of Balinese artistry.Ideal for gardens, patios, or boutique outdoor settings, this parasol isn’t just shade - it’s a statement piece that tells a story of heritage and colour.How to Open and Secure the Parasol:Place the parasol on the floor with the top side facing down.Hold the pole firmly and push the runner (the sliding wooden ring) downwards until the canopy is fully open.When the hole appears, insert the peg through it to lock the runner in place.

Powered by a battery-operated mechanism for the moving hand (battery not included).A charming décor accent for those who enjoy cultural symbols, colour, and a hint of everyday optimism.

name: Mini Speaker - Beyond Size
description: Small enough to fit in the palm of your hand, this mini wireless speaker delivers clear sound in a compact, modern design. Lightweight and easy to carry, it’s ideal for desks, travel, or casual listening at home. The speaker features wireless connectivity (Bluetooth 5.0) and a simple one-button control on the base for easy operation. Despite its size, it offers a 3W output with a frequency response of 20Hz–20kHz, making it well suited for music, podcasts, and calls. The built-in 300mAh battery provides up to 2.5 hours of playback, with a full recharge taking around 2 hours via USB charging.Supplied boxed with a USB charging cable, user manual, and fastening cord, this mini speaker is designed for everyday convenience. Compatible with phones, notebooks, and tablets, it’s a practical, giftable tech accessory with broad appeal.

name: Wooden Mandela Effect Mini Speaker
description: Small enough to sit in the palm of your hand, the Wooden Mandela Effect Mini Speaker delivers clear wireless sound with a warm, natural wooden finish. With a 3W output and a wide 20Hz–20kHz frequency range, it’s ideal for relaxed listening at home, on a desk, or while travelling. The compact wooden casing gives it a calm, minimalist look, while the top metal grille helps sound project evenly. A built-in 300mAh rechargeable battery provides around two hours of playtime, and recharges fully in about two hours via the included USB cable. Wireless connectivity keeps setup simple, with no cables needed during use.Designed for everyday use in small spaces, this mini speaker balances portability, style, and practical sound performance in a compact form.

name: Camping Hook Green Mini Speaker
description: Compact, portable, and built for easy outdoor use, the Camping Hook Green Mini Speaker delivers clear sound in a pocket-sized design. The built-in carry hook makes it simple to attach to bags, tents, or branches, turning any spot into an instant listening space. This wireless mini speaker features Bluetooth V5.3 with a stable connection range of up to 10 metres. With an output power of 5W and a signal-to-noise ratio of ≥85dB, it produces balanced sound that holds up well for its size. The 400mAh rechargeable battery offers approximately 2–4 hours of playtime and recharges fully in 2–4 hours via USB.Designed for convenience, the speaker supports play, pause, track control, and volume adjustment directly from the unit. Its compact metal body with a matte green finish feels sturdy yet lightweight, making it ideal for travel, camping, picnics, or everyday use.Supplied boxed and ready to use, this mini speaker is a practical gift choice for music lovers who like sound on the move.

name: Red Mandela Lighting Effect Mini Speaker
description: This compact wireless mini speaker combines bold sound with a striking mandala-style LED lighting effect, creating atmosphere wherever it’s placed. Designed for everyday listening, it’s small enough to carry yet powerful enough for personal spaces, desks, and evenings outdoors. The speaker uses Bluetooth 5.3 for stable wireless playback within a range of up to 10 metres and delivers clear audio through a 40mm, 3W driver. A built-in 600mAh rechargeable battery provides approximately 2–4 hours of playtime and recharges via USB at 5V.In addition to Bluetooth playback, the speaker supports TF cards and includes an FM radio function. FM radio works when the speaker is placed on a metal surface, which helps act as an antenna. The integrated LED lighting adds a colourful mandala-style glow, making it as decorative as it is functional.

name: SIlver Mandela Lighting Effect Mini Speaker
description: A compact mini speaker with a silver finish and mandala-style lighting effect, designed for portable everyday use. The circular design fits comfortably in the hand and includes an integrated carry loop for easy transport. The speaker supports wireless audio playback via Bluetooth 5.3 and features a built-in LED light effect that illuminates during use. It is powered by a 600mAh rechargeable battery, providing approximately 2–4 hours of playback time depending on volume and usage. Charging is via USB cable (included).Additional functions listed on the packaging include TF card playback, hands-free calling, HiFi stereo sound, and FM radio mode. FM radio reception works when the speaker is placed on a metal surface, which acts as the antenna.Speaker specifications shown on the box include a 40mm driver (4Ω, 3W), frequency response of 40Hz–18kHz, and a wireless transmission distance of up to 10 metres. Compatible with iOS and Android devices.

name: Green Camping Hanging Light and Mini Speaker
description: This compact camping light and mini speaker combines wireless audio with ambient LED lighting in a single, portable design. Measuring 73 × 73 × 73 mm and weighing 170 g, it’s easy to carry, hang, or place on tables, tents, or outdoor surfaces. The built-in 40 mm speaker delivers clear sound with a frequency response of 40 Hz–18 kHz and connects via Bluetooth 5.3, offering a stable wireless range of up to 10 metres. Playback controls are integrated into the body for track selection, volume adjustment, and play/pause.A rechargeable 600 mAh battery provides approximately 2–4 hours of use, depending on volume and lighting mode. The integrated LED light features multiple lighting modes, with simple button control to switch effects or turn the light off independently from the speaker.FM radio mode is included and can be accessed via the control button. Supplied with a USB charging cable. A practical dual-function accessory designed for camping, festivals, gardens, and casual outdoor use.

name: Mint Rock Mini Speaker
description: Compact in size but surprisingly powerful, the Mint Rock Mini Speaker delivers clear sound with strong bass in a solid metal-style design. Measuring approximately 55 × 59 mm and weighing 130 g, it’s easy to carry, display, or gift. This mini speaker features 5W output, a wide 20Hz–20kHz frequency response, and Bluetooth connectivity for wireless playback. The built-in 500mAh rechargeable battery provides up to 4 hours of playtime, with charging via USB (5V) in around 2 hours.Designed with TWS 1+1 pairing, two speakers can be connected together for a true stereo experience. Finished in a cool mint tone with a textured, rock-inspired body, it combines practical audio performance with strong visual appeal.A compact, giftable speaker with real sound presence, ideal for desks, travel, or casual listening.

name: Phone Connect Magsafe Tech Mini Speaker  - G300
description: Small, clever, and surprisingly powerful. The G300 is a magnetic mini speaker designed to snap neatly onto the back of a phone, doubling as both a wireless speaker and a phone stand. Delivering a 5W output, it produces clear sound with punchy bass for its size. Bluetooth wireless version 5.4 ensures a stable connection, with up to 4 hours of playtime on a full charge. The built-in LED lighting adds a subtle visual edge, making it feel more like a gadget than a novelty.Magnetic suction allows it to attach directly to MagSafe-compatible phones. For non-magnetic devices, the included metal ring can be fitted between the phone and case, keeping it widely compatible across most smartphones.Compact, portable, and easy to use, the G300 is ideal for desks, travel, gifting, or everyday hands-free listening.

name: Retro Radio Speaker - Jojocut C10
description: Small enough to carry in one hand, the Jojocut C10 Retro Radio Speaker pairs a playful vintage radio look with easy wireless listening. A handy carry handle and simple top controls make it an effortless little companion for music anywhere. Connect via Bluetooth 5.1 (range ≥10 m) and enjoy clear sound from the 5W speaker (45 mm, 4Ω). It also supports TF card playback and hands-free calling, so it’s ready for both playlists and quick calls. The built-in rechargeable battery (3.7V 800mAh) offers around 2–4 hours of playing time, with a 2–3 hour charge time via DC 5V⎓1A (USB). Size: 106 × 54 × 84 mm.

name: Retro Mini Gramophone Speaker - Bluetooth & FM Radio - 5 watt x 1

Compact and decorative, it features a classic gramophone-style horn paired with a warm wood-effect base, designed to sit neatly on a desk, shelf or bedside table. The speaker supports Bluetooth wireless playback and FM radio, giving flexible ways to enjoy music, podcasts or radio stations. Physical controls on the front allow easy volume and playback adjustment, while the built-in rechargeable battery keeps it portable and cable-free during use.The speaker includes a single 5W driver and comes supplied with a USB charging cable and audio lead. Its small footprint makes it ideal for gifting or adding character to a living space without dominating it. A practical audio accessory with a playful vintage twist.

name: Retro Mini Double Gramophone Speaker - Bluetooth - 5.4 watt x 2
